zh.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke是John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall和Katherine Patterdale的兒子，於1524年出生在英國英格蘭。他和Anne Smyth至少有10個兒子和4個女兒。他在英國英格蘭倫敦被列為master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi。他去世於1569年1月28日在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦享年45歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 斯蒂芬 沃爾布盧可 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 黑雷格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke是John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall和Katherine Patterdale的儿子，于1524年出生在英国英格兰。他和Anne Smyth至少有10个儿子和4个女儿。他在英国英格兰倫敦被列为master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi。他去世于1569年1月28日在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦享年45岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 斯蒂芬 沃爾布盧可 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 黑雷格。

nameMeanings.name: Yorke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: York
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke was born in 1524, in England, United Kingdom as the son of John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall and Katherine Patterdale. He had at least 10 sons and 4 daughters with Anne Smyth. His occupation is listed as master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi in London, England, United Kingdom. He died on 28 January 1569, in City of London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke est né en 1524, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall et Katherine Patterdale. Il a eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles avec Anne Smyth. Sa profession de son indiquée est master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1569, à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, Angleterre.

Er hatte mit Anne Smyth mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi in London, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Januar 1569 im Alter von 45 Jahren in City of London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke è nato il nel 1524 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall e Katherine Patterdale. Lui avuto almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie con Anne Smyth. La sua occupazione è indicata come master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 28 gennaio 1569, nel City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorkeは1524年にイギリスイギリスでJohn Yorke of Gouthwaite HallとKatherine Patterdaleの息子として生まれた。彼はAnne Smythとの間に少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。イギリスイギリスロンドンでの職業はmaster of the mint to kings henry viii and edward viと記録されている。彼は1569年1月28日にイギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンで45歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ステフン ワルブルーク ウィス スト ベンエット シェレhオグにて埋葬された。

ko.St Stephen Walbrook, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 스티븐 월브룩 위스 스트 베넷 셔호그
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke(은)는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall(와)과 Katherine Patterdale의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Anne Smyth(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi이었다. 그는 1569년 1월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 스티븐 월브룩 위스 스트 베넷 셔호그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke nasceu em 1524, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall e Katherine Patterdale. Ele teve pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas com Anne Smyth. Sua profissão aparece como master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1569, em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.St Stephen Walbrook, London, England: лондон ст стифен валбрук вит ст бинет ширэог, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke родился в 1524 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall и Katherine Patterdale. У него было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери от Anne Smyth.  Он работал по профессии master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 28 января 1569 г. в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности лондон ст стифен валбрук вит ст бинет ширэог, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir John Yorke nació en 1524, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John Yorke of Gouthwaite Hall y Katherine Patterdale. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas con Anne Smyth. Su ocupación registrada era master of the mint to kings henry viii and edward vi en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 28 de enero de 1569, en City of London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en London St Stephen Walbrook with St Benet Sherehog, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
